prompt: Could you add a new NFS: 'The system must be backward compatible with previous API versions for at least 1 year.' This is of medium priority. Also, clarify if URS-020, 'User Account Deactivation', includes data anonymization or full deletion.

expected.addRequirement: add a new NFS: 'The system must be backward compatible with previous API versions for at least 1 year'.
expected.prioritizeRequirement: set priority to Medium for the new NFS regarding backward compatibility.
expected.clarifyRequirement: clarify if URS-020, 'User Account Deactivation', includes data anonymization or full deletion.
